subject: Laptop crashed with blue screen - need help urgently
description:
Hi support,

My laptop crashed with a blue screen this morning while I was working in Excel. I managed to take some photos of the screen before it rebooted. Here they are:

[Screenshot 1 - Blue Screen]
data:image/png;base64,

The screen was completely blue with white text. I couldn't read all of it because it restarted quickly.

[Screenshot 2 - Error after reboot]
data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQEASABIAAD/4gHYSUNDX1BST0ZJTEUAAQEAAAHIAAAAAAQwAABtbnRyUkdCIFhZWiAH4AABAAEAAAAAAABhY3NwAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAQAA9tYAAQAAAADTLQAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA/9j/2wBDAAMCAgMCAgMDAwMEAwMEBQgFBQQEBQoHBwYIDAoMCwsKCwsNDhIQDQ4RDgsLEBYQ

After it rebooted there was an error message but I couldn't capture it in time.

[Screenshot 3 - Event Viewer]
data:image/png;base64,

I think it said something about KERNEL_DATA_INPAGE_ERROR but I'm not 100% sure. This is the third time it's happened this month. Each time I lose whatever I was working on. Please help - I have a presentation due tomorrow and I can't afford another crash.

Thanks,
Robert Chen

subject: Printer not working / الطابعة لا تعمل / プリンターが動作しません
description:
Hello IT support,

I need help with the printer on the 2nd floor. It shows as offline.

لقد حاولت إعادة تشغيل الطابعة عدة مرات لكنها لا تزال تظهر كغير متصلة. الطابعة موجودة في الطابق الثاني بجانب غرفة الاجتماعات. لقد تحققت من الكابلات وكلها متصلة بشكل صحيح. الضوء البرتقالي يومض على الطابعة.

I asked my colleague Yuki to also report this:

2階のプリンターが動作しません。印刷ジョブを送信しましたが、何も印刷されませんでした。プリンターの画面に「オフライン」と表示されています。ネットワーク接続を確認しましたが、ケーブルは接続されているようです。オレンジ色のランプが点滅しています。先週金曜日から問題が発生しています。

To summarize the issue:
- The printer shows as offline on all computers
- الطابعة تظهر كغير متصلة على جميع الأجهزة
- すべてのコンピュータでプリンターがオフラインと表示される

We have tried:
1. Restarting the printer / إعادة تشغيل الطابعة / プリンターの再起動
2. Checking cables / فحص الكابلات / ケーブルの確認
3. Removing and re-adding the printer / حذف الطابعة وإعادة إضافتها / プリンターの削除と再追加

Orange blinking light is on. الضوء البرتقالي يومض. オレンジ色のランプが点滅中。

Please send someone to look at it. شكراً / ありがとうございます

Fatima Al-Rashid
فاطمة الراشد

subject: RE: RE: RE: Teams calls dropping - is this fixed or not?
description:
From: Gloria Reeves <gloria.reeves@contoso.com>
Date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 16:45:00 -0500
To: IT Helpdesk <helpdesk@contoso.com>

Hi helpdesk - I'm forwarding this mess because we STILL have the issue. Please read the whole thread and ignore all the "it's fixed" messages because it is NOT fixed. Teams calls drop after exactly location minutes every single time.

--- Original thread ---

From: Nathan Cross <nathan.cross@contoso.com>
Date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 16:30:00 -0500

> Gloria is right, the issue is still happening as of 30 minutes ago. I was on a client call and it dropped at the 10 minute mark AGAIN. This is embarrassing and we're losing client confidence.

From: Deepa Krishnan <deepa.krishnan@contoso.com>
Date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 15:15:00 -0500

>> Actually, I take it back. It happened again just now. My 3pm meeting dropped at around the 10-minute mark. So it's definitely not fixed.

From: Nathan Cross <nathan.cross@contoso.com>
Date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 14:00:00 -0500

>>> I haven't had any drops today. Maybe it IS fixed? I had two short calls this morning (about 5 min each) and they were fine.

From: Deepa Krishnan <deepa.krishnan@contoso.com>
Date: Tue, 17 Mar 2026 12:30:00 -0500

>>>> Just checked - IT said they applied a QoS policy update last night. They believe the issue should be resolved. Can everyone test and report back?

From: Gloria Reeves <gloria.reeves@contoso.com>
Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2026 17:00:00 -0500

>>>>> This is getting ridiculous. Third day in a row. Every Teams call over 10 minutes just drops. Audio cuts out first, then video freezes, then "reconnecting..." for 30 seconds and then it disconnects entirely. I've tried from both my laptop and my phone on WiFi - same result.

From: Nathan Cross <nathan.cross@contoso.com>
Date: Mon, 16 Mar 2026 11:00:00 -0500

>>>>>> Same here. My 10am standup just died mid-sentence. The weird thing is Zoom works perfectly fine - I tested with an external call. It's only Teams.

From: Deepa Krishnan <deepa.krishnan@contoso.com>
Date: Fri, 13 Mar 2026 16:00:00 -0500

>>>>>>> Is anyone else's Teams calls dropping randomly? Started today for me. Calls seem to die after about 10 minutes.

--- End thread ---

To be clear: The issue is that Microsoft Teams calls consistently disconnect after approximately 10 minutes. This has been happening since at least March 13th. Multiple people are affected. The QoS fix that was applied did NOT resolve the issue.

(╯°□°)╯︵ ┻━┻   THE SERVER IS FULL   ┬─┬ノ( º _ ºノ)

OK so here's the actual problem 👇👇👇

The shared file server \\fs-corp-03 is completely out of disk space. The D: drive is showing 99.2% full with only 847 MB remaining out of 4 TB. 📊

I noticed it when I couldn't save a report this morning. The error said "There is not enough space on the disk" 💾❌

┌─────────────────────────┐
│  Drive D: Usage          │
│  ████████████████████░  │
│  99.2% (3.99 TB / 4 TB) │
│  Free: 847 MB            │
└─────────────────────────┘

I did some digging 🔍 and it looks like someone's backup job is dumping huge files into D:\Backups\Archive\ - there are .bak files from 2019 that nobody needs anymore taking up like 1.5 TB 😱😱😱

¯\_(ツ)_/¯ Not sure who set that up but it's been running forever apparently

🎵 Things I've already tried 🎵
✅ Emptied the Recycle Bin (freed up 2 GB temporarily, filled again)
✅ Ran Disk Cleanup (barely helped)
✅ Deleted my own old files
❌ Can't delete files from Backups\Archive - need admin access

⭐ PLEASE ⭐ someone either clean up those old backups or expand the drive before it crashes 💥

(ノಠ益ಠ)ノ彡┻━┻  SERIOUSLY THIS IS URGENT  ┬─┬ノ(ಠ_ಠノ)

🙏🙏🙏 Thanks 🙏🙏🙏

— Reggie Watts
   IT Ops Coordinator
   💻 reggie.watts@contoso.com

🚨 P.S. Other people are starting to notice too. Got three complaints in the last hour about not being able to save files. 🚨

╔══════════════════════════════════════╗
║  Please resolve ASAP ❗❗❗          ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════╝
